name: bci.generate
description: Generate a behavior-conditioned LLM response using retrieved behaviors as context. Automatically retrieves relevant behaviors if not explicitly provided, composes a BCI prompt, and generates a response using the configured LLM provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenRouter, Ollama, etc.). Emits telemetry to Raze for token savings accounting.

query.description: The user query or task to solve

behaviors.description: Optional explicit behavior names to use. If not provided, retrieves top_k behaviors automatically.

top_k.description: Number of behaviors to retrieve if behaviors not explicitly provided

provider.description: LLM provider to use. If not provided, loads from GUIDEAI_LLM_PROVIDER environment variable.

model.description: Model name to use (e.g., gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet). If not provided, uses provider default.

role_focus.description: Role focus for behavior retrieval (filters behaviors by role)

input_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the input

output_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the output

behaviors_used.description: List of behavior names prepended to the prompt

latency_ms.description: Total end-to-end latency including retrieval and generation
